cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (for approval for transfer of payment rights by and between s.m. and mac-doug-all, llc pursuant to california insurance code 10134 et seq.)

docket_entries.description: AMENEDED EXHIBIT A TO VERIFIED PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN S.M. AND MAC-DOUG-ALL, LLC PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134 ET SEQ. (TRANSACTION ID # 100044991) FILED BY PETITIONER MAC-DOUG-ALL, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-24-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-24-2018 HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN S. M. AND MAC-DOUG-ALL, LLC, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ. , THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTED PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL FOR NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN UNDER THE INSURANCE CODE. PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between S. M. And Mac-Doug-All, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colby Dean LaVelle II, Esq.of LaVelle Law Offices, 925.351.4550, appearing for the Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Matter called. No argument held.

There being no other appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on: Notice of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between S. M. And Mac-Doug-All, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. as follows: Petitioner's Motion for Approval for Transfer is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown under the Insurance Code. Petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)
